zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre I Sire De Grandison於大約1190年出生在瑞士波格a特爾時，他的父親Ebles IV de Grandson38歲，母親Beatrix Genève37歲。他於1229年與Agnes Neufchâtel在瑞士波格a特爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1257年12月29日在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre I Sire De Grandison于大约1190年出生在瑞士波格a特爾时，他的父亲Ebles IV de Grandson38岁，母亲Beatrix Genève37岁。他于1229年与Agnes Neufchâtel在瑞士波格a特爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1257年12月29日在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grandison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): said to be a habitational name from Granson on Lake Neuchâtel (Switzerland).

History: The first known bearer of this surname is Rigaldus de Grancione (flourished 1040). The name was taken to Britain by Otes de Grandison (died 1328) and his brother. They were among a group of Savoyards who settled in England when Henry III married a granddaughter of the Count of Savoy.

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Sire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘shee-la’; derived in the early Middle Ages from Anglo-Norman Cecile. See Cecily .

variants.name: Shilla
meanings: Modern coinage, apparently an altered form of   Sheila .

variants.name: Sheelah
meanings: Pronounced ‘shee-la’; derived in the early Middle Ages from Anglo-Norman Cecile. See Cecily .

variants.name: Sheila
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Síle, the Irish Gaelic form of Cecily . This name has become so common and widespread that it is hardly felt to be Irish any longer. In Australia since the 19th century it has been a slang generic term for any woman.

variants.name: Shelagh
meanings: Variant of   Sheila .  The final consonants in the written form seem to have been added to give a Gaelic feel to the name. There is no etymological justification for them.

variants.name: Shayla
meanings: Recent coinage, apparently a variant of   Sheila .

variants.name: Sheelagh
meanings: Pronounced ‘shee-la’; derived in the early Middle Ages from Anglo-Norman Cecile. See Cecily .

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre I Sire De Grandison was born about 1190, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland, his father, Ebles IV de Grandson, was 38 and his mother, Beatrix Genève, was 37. He married Agnes Neufchâtel in 1229, in Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 29 December 1257, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre I Sire De Grandison est né environ 1190, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse, son père, Ebles IV de Grandson, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Genève, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Neufchâtel en 1229, à Neuchâtel, Canton de Neuchâtel, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 décembre 1257, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre I Sire De Grandison um 1190 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebles IV de Grandson 38 und seine Mutter Beatrix Genève 37. Er hat 1229 in Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Schweiz Agnes Neufchâtel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Dezember 1257 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre I Sire De Grandison è nato il circa 1190 nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera, il suo padre, Ebles IV de Grandson, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix Genève, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Neufchâtel nel 1229, nel Neuchâtel, Neuchâtel, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 dicembre 1257, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre I Sire De Grandisonが約1190年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルで生まれた時，父Ebles IV de Grandsonは38歳，母Beatrix Genèveは37歳であった。1229年にスイスネウエンブルグネウチaテルでAgnes Neufchâtelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1257年12月29日に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre I Sire De Grandison(이)가 대략 1190년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebles IV de Grandson(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix Genève(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1229년 스위스 니우버그 니우cha텔에서 Agnes Neufchâtel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1257년 12월 29일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre I Sire De Grandison nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça, seu pai, Ebles IV de Grandson, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Genève, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Neufchâtel em 1229, em Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de dezembro de 1257, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre I Sire De Grandison родился около 1190 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Ebles IV de Grandson было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Genève, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Neufchâtel в 1229 г. в местности неучaтел, неуенбург, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 декабря 1257 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre I Sire De Grandison nació aproximadamente 1190, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza, su papá, Ebles IV de Grandson, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Beatrix Genève, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Agnes Neufchâtel en 1229, en Neuchâtel, Neuenburg, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de diciembre de 1257, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
